name: Fettuccine with Tuna Sauce
recipeIngredient: 6 1/2 oz tuna in water; drain and flake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet over medium heat, cook the onion and garlic in the margarine for 2 minutes.
2. Add the tuna and pepper; cook and stir for an additional 2 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, toss the hot fettuccine with the tuna sauce and lettuce until well mixed.
